articles.title: 2 Ariana Grande concerts at TD Garden are rescheduled
articles.description:
The Grammy-winning singer says production challenges prompted changes to two Boston-area shows.

The post 2 Ariana Grande concerts at TD Garden are rescheduled appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ariana Grande's two concerts at TD Garden are rescheduled due to production challenges.
The new dates for the shows will be announced shortly.
Boston fans may face changes in travel and accommodation plans due to rescheduling.

articles.title: Bruins prospect Dean Letourneau has gone from a project to a legitimate blue-chip talent
articles.description:
"I think it was partly just the confidence in my ability. I knew what I could do."

The post Bruins prospect Dean Letourneau has gone from a project to a legitimate blue-chip talent appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins prospect Dean Letourneau shows significant improvement, now viewed as a blue-chip talent.
Letourneau's confidence has surged, enhancing his performance at Boston College.
His development could strengthen the Bruins' roster for the upcoming NHL season.

articles.title: Why did City Hall’s FIFA Fan Festival close with some World Cup games left to play?
articles.description:
The 16-day festival run became one of the defining gathering places of Boston's World Cup experience. 

The post Why did City Hall’s FIFA Fan Festival close with some World Cup games left to play? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: City Hall's FIFA Fan Festival closed early, ending 16 days of World Cup celebrations.
The festival was a major gathering spot for Boston residents during the World Cup.
Closure leaves fans without a local venue for remaining World Cup matches.

articles.title: Contreras and Durbin homer as Red Sox extend win streak to 5 games with 6-3 win over Nationals
articles.description:
The Red Sox extended their winning streak to a season-high five games.

The post Contreras and Durbin homer as Red Sox extend win streak to 5 games with 6-3 win over Nationals appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox win 6-3 against Nationals, marking their fifth consecutive victory.
Contreras and Durbin each hit home runs, contributing to the team's success.
This winning streak boosts local morale as the team approaches playoff contention.

articles.title: Could Bruins be a viable landing spot for Darnell Nurse via trade?
articles.description:
Nurse is a top-four defense, but is signed to a contract that accounts for a $9.25 million annual cap hit.

The post Could Bruins be a viable landing spot for Darnell Nurse via trade? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins consider trading for Darnell Nurse, a top-four defenseman from Edmonton Oilers.
Nurse's contract includes a $9.25 million annual cap hit affecting team budget.
Potential trade could enhance Bruins' defense, impacting local fan engagement and team performance.
